testcase.name: test_get_order_by_order_number
test_truly_missing_returns_404
test_coupon_validates[BETADOLLAR79]

failure.message: AssertionError: BETADOLLAR79 invalid: {'valid': False, 'discount_percent': 0, 'discount_dollars': 0.0, 'override_total': None, 'message': 'This code has expired', 'code': 'BETADOLLAR79', 'is_gift_certificate': False} assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdfb52ff3a80>('valid') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdfb52ff3a80> = {'code': 'BETADOLLAR79', 'discount_dollars': 0.0, 'discount_percent': 0, 'is_gift_certificate': False, ...}.get

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: BETADOLLAR79 invalid: {'valid': False, 'discount_percent': 0, 'discount_dollars': 0.0, 'override_total': None, 'message': 'This code has expired', 'code': 'BETADOLLAR79', 'is_gift_certificate': False} assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdfb52ff3a80>('valid') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdfb52ff3a80> = {'code': 'BETADOLLAR79', 'discount_dollars': 0.0, 'discount_percent': 0, 'is_gift_certificate': False, ...}.get
